parameters.query:
INSERT INTO app.helpdesk_logs (log_type, user_id, channel_id, message, thread_ts, status, created_at)
VALUES (
  'INQUIRY',
  '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.user_id }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.channel_id }}',
  '{{ ($('Webhook').first().json.body.message || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.thread_ts || '' }}',
  'OPEN',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id

UPDATE app.helpdesk_logs
SET ai_response_text = '{{ $json.responseText }}',
    category = 'INFO_RECEIVED',
    log_type = 'INFO_RECEIVED'
WHERE id = {{ $json.logId }}

SELECT log_type, message, ai_response_text, status
FROM app.helpdesk_logs
WHERE thread_ts = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.thread_ts }}'
  AND thread_ts != ''
  AND log_type IN ('INQUIRY', 'AI_RESPONSE')
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 20

INSERT INTO app.helpdesk_logs (
  log_type, inquiry_id, user_id, channel_id, message, category, priority, summary,
  ai_response, ai_response_text, resolution_steps, needs_escalation, escalation_team,
  matched_kb_ids, confidence_scores, tokens_input, tokens_output, model_name,
  raw_agent_response, thread_ts, turn_number, is_multi_turn, status, created_at
)
VALUES (
  'AI_RESPONSE',
  {{ $json.inquiry_log_id }},
  '{{ $json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}',
  '{{ $json.original_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.category }}',
  '{{ $json.priority }}',
  '{{ ($json.summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.raw_response || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.ai_response_text || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.resolution_steps || "[]" }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.needs_escalation || false }},
  {{ $json.escalation_team ? "'" + $json.escalation_team + "'" : "NULL" }},
  '{{ $json.matched_kb_ids || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.confidence_scores || "[]" }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.tokens_input || 0 }},
  {{ $json.tokens_output || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.model_name || "unknown" }}',
  '{{ ($json.raw_agent_response || "{}").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.thread_ts }}',
  {{ $json.turn_number || 1 }},
  {{ $json.is_multi_turn || false }},
  'IN_PROGRESS',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO app.helpdesk_logs (log_type, inquiry_id, user_id, channel_id, evaluation, evaluation_comment, thread_ts, created_at)
VALUES (
  'EVALUATION',
  {{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.log_id || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.user_id }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.channel_id }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.evaluation }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.comment || '' }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.thread_ts || '' }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id

UPDATE app.helpdesk_logs
SET status = 'ESCALATED'
WHERE id = {{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.log_id }};

WITH log_data AS (
  SELECT message, category, priority, summary, user_id, thread_ts
  FROM app.helpdesk_logs
  WHERE id = {{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.log_id }}
)
INSERT INTO app.helpdesk_tickets (
  ticket_id,
  reporter_name,
  issue_type,
  urgency,
  summary,
  source_channel,
  status,
  thread_ts,
  log_id,
  created_at
)
SELECT
  'TKT-' || TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD-HH24MISS'),
  COALESCE(user_id, 'Unknown'),
  COALESCE(category, 'OTHER'),
  COALESCE(priority, 'MEDIUM'),
  COALESCE(summary, 'Escalated from AI'),
  'slack',
  'OPEN',
  thread_ts,
  {{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.log_id }},
  NOW()
FROM log_data
RETURNING ticket_id

UPDATE app.helpdesk_logs
SET status = 'RESOLVED',
    resolved_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.log_id }};

UPDATE app.helpdesk_logs
SET status = 'RESOLVED'
WHERE thread_ts = '{{ $('Webhook - Evaluation').first().json.body.thread_ts }}'
  AND thread_ts != ''
  AND status != 'RESOLVED';
